strategy: Two-boss fight (The Rat and The Scorpion), 28,000 health, full team. Both resist little (15%), so hit with your strongest school.
Feint carefully. The first Feint on The Rat is a free warning, but a second regular Feint bounces all his negatives back onto the caster. Use Mass Feint or Balance Feint, which never trigger it.
Do not Feint The Scorpion either; he Cleanse-Wards all unprotected traps off himself in response.
Avoid DoTs. The Scorpion Detonates them on the whole team every round if anyone carries one.
Do not self-heal. The Scorpion natural-attacks any wizard who heals (a HoT-first heal avoids it). Join on time to skip the tardiness traps and Bad Juju.
Funnel to one hitter and burst each brother; the two constantly retaliate on each other, which chips them for you.
cheatNotes: Joining late gets you +60% Fire/Ice/Universal traps and a Dimension Shift dumping The Rat's negatives onto you.
Joining late also gets you Bad Juju from The Scorpion.
Round 1 The Scorpion gives himself 2 Shadow pips.
The Rat then steals one Shadow pip from The Scorpion, part of their infighting.
The Scorpion retaliates, stealing 2 pips back from The Rat.
The first Feint on The Rat is safe; he only warns you.
A second regular Feint on The Rat bounces all his negatives onto the caster via Dimension Shift. Do not stack regular Feints on him.
Mass Feint does not trigger that bounce, so it is safe.
Balance Feint does not trigger it either.
Pet-cast Feints do not trigger it.
Every 3 rounds The Scorpion Poisons all wizards (Shadow DoT).
Every round he Detonates DoTs on the whole team if anyone has one. Avoid carrying DoTs.
Placing a HoT before a DoT lets the HoT absorb the Detonate instead of the DoT, a way to shield your DoTs.
Feinting The Scorpion makes him Cleanse-Ward all unprotected traps off himself.
Healing makes The Scorpion natural-attack the healer.
Pet heals do not trigger it, except Fairy Friend and Happy Accident.
The HoT portion of a heal does not trigger the natural attack.
If The Scorpion casts Enfeeble or Glowbug Squall, The Rat hits him with Scorching Scimitars, free chip on The Scorpion.
Sometimes after The Scorpion's Iron Sultan, The Rat retaliates with Grand Blue Phoenix and Impede on him.
If The Rat casts Steal Charm or Steal Ward, The Scorpion hits The Rat with Iron Sultan.
Sometimes after The Rat's Scimitars, The Scorpion answers with Impede and Supernova on The Rat.
